task: Rebuild MidpointX with LangGraph and Gemini 3.1 Pro
outcomes: Successfully created LangGraph state machine orchestrating AI workflows.
Integrated Vertex AI Context Store (Corpora) via @google/genai SDK for persisting and accessing logic shifts.
Built a Web UI with glassmorphism to interact with the LangGraph via Socket.IO.
Containerized application with Docker multi-stage builds.
patterns_observed: The user provided a very well-structured AI architecture document masquerading as a chat log. Executing such prompts strictly requires adapting step sequences directly from the markdown into working file layouts.
errors_encountered: Encountered ETARGET when npm installing '@google/genai@^0.1.2'. Corrected by pinning version to 'latest'.
corrections_made: Modified package.json @google/genai to use 'latest' rather than missing version ^0.1.2.
